exact_quote: the Mountain Park will provide tubing and lift access to a network of terrain parks including a half-pipe, a Woodward Peace Park, and multiple progression and performance parks
notes: SnowBrains press coverage describes Woodward Park City as a terrain-park-focused mountain (half-pipe, Peace Park, progression/performance parks) without giving a discrete trail count or beginner/intermediate/advanced/expert split. KPCW (regional news, 2025-09-29) and Park Record press releases similarly omit numeric trail counts and difficulty percentages. No news/press source provides a quantified trails_total or difficulty_pct for Woodward Park City.

BestSnow.net regional ski guide reports Variability-Index difficulty distribution: Green 12% (beginner), Blue 42% (intermediate), Red 27% (advanced), Black 16% + Yellow 3% = 19% (expert/double-black). No exact trails_total provided in this source. SnowBrains press coverage states '2,900 skiable acres and 2,700ft of vertical drop' but no run count; the often-cited '100+ runs' figure appears only in marketing copy, not in a quotable news/press total. Difficulty_pct sums to 100.
